finding_results.notes: Ending now includes an executed emergency expansion/freeze filing with timestamped clerk stamp, logged service confirmation, and immediate reactions from Beau and Mara to the completed action.

Appendix decoding is intercut with immediate room-level conflict (counsel attempts to halt copying; Beau compels continuation) and multiple concrete bodily stress reactions from Lena before strategy dialogue resumes.

summary: Resolved both structural/craft findings by hardening embodied consequence at the reveal turn and replacing the conditional truce ending with a completed, externally verifiable procedural move that locks a new board state.
